lesson.title: Fundamental Data Structures & Algorithms
lesson.explanation: Data structures organize data for efficient access. Arrays provide O(1) random access. Linked lists allow O(1) insertion/deletion. Hash tables achieve O(1) average lookup via hash functions. Binary search trees maintain sorted order with O(log n) operations. Heaps support O(1) min/max access and O(log n) insertion. Graphs represent networks of connections.
